files.GUIDES-19555-sample-map.ditamap:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE map PUBLIC "-//OASIS//DTD DITA Map//EN" "map.dtd">
<map id="guides_19555_map" xml:lang="en-US">
  <title>GUIDES-19555 — Sample map with headerless reltable (2×2)</title>
  <topicref href="GUIDES-19555-topic-overview.dita"/>
  <!-- No relheader: matches customer repro (new reltable without header row). -->
  <reltable>
    <relrow>
      <relcell>
        <topicref href="GUIDES-19555-topic-source.dita"/>
      </relcell>
      <relcell/>
    </relrow>
    <relrow>
      <relcell/>
      <relcell/>
    </relrow>
  </reltable>
</map>
files.GUIDES-19555-topic-source.dita:
GUIDES-19555 — Source topic (reltable column A) Place this topic in the first reltable cell to reproduce column-collapse behavior in legacy Author view.

Represents the source side of a relationship row in the sample reltable.
files.GUIDES-19555-topic-target.dita:
GUIDES-19555 — Target topic (reltable column B) Intended for the second column of the reltable after the grid remains usable.

Represents the target topic for the relationship link.
files.GUIDES-19555-topic-overview.dita:
GUIDES-19555 — Map sibling topic Ordinary topicref on the sample map (outside the reltable).

This topic is included so the map is not reltable-only.
files.GUIDES-19555-concept.dita:
GUIDES-19555: Make new reltable easier to use (column collapse, tags view) In AEM Guides Author with tags enabled, a new map reltable without a header row can look like a four-cell grid until a topic is placed in the first cell; then later columns collapse and targets are hard to add. Full tags view can also garble overlapping reltable link text. Dataset Studio (Jira GUIDES-19555) NewEditor reltable Workday Author view
Problem

Customers (Workday, LinkedIn, Thomson Reuters, and others per Jira) report reltable authoring pain in the map editor when tagging is enabled:

  • Column collapse: After creating a new reltable without a header row and placing a reference in the first cell, the second (and later) columns shrink so much that placing a target reference is very difficult (repro noted by engineering).
  • Full tags view: Reltable link text can overlap adjacent columns, so authors fall back to Source view to fix or extend relationships.
Reporter context (from Jira)
  • Workday — IMS org 0AB2768154D414A20A4C98A5@AdobeOrg, program cm-p108955, environment e1062829; reproducible on prod and stage.
  • Historical: AEM Guides 2024.6.0.72 cited during support triage.
  • Dynamics / investigations linked from Jira (e.g. E-001341872, full investigation URL in ticket).
Reproduction steps (verbatim pattern from Jira)
  1. Open AEM Guides Author view with tags enabled.
  2. Create a new reltable without a header row in a map.
  3. Observe an initial four-cell grid layout.
  4. Place a topic reference in the first cell.
  5. Observe the second column collapsing (last columns nearly zero width), hindering target placement.
Expected vs actual Description Expected The reltable keeps a usable grid so target topics can be placed in subsequent cells. Actual Column width collapses after the first-cell link; full tags view can overlap link text across columns.
Bundled minimal DITA (this dataset)

File GUIDES-19555-sample-map.ditamap contains a reltable with no relheader, two relrow elements, two relcell children each (2×2 grid). The first cell references GUIDES-19555-topic-source.dita; other cells are empty for you to populate in the editor when testing.

  • GUIDES-19555-sample-map.ditamap
  • GUIDES-19555-topic-overview.dita
  • GUIDES-19555-topic-source.dita
  • GUIDES-19555-topic-target.dita
Verification notes (Jira comments)

Engineering reported not reproducible on the new editor (see Manav Mittal comment, Jan 2026). Prashant Pal verified on build 5.3.0.6523 with a sample map (screenshot in Jira, Mar 2026). Issue status in Jira is Closed; this bundle remains useful as a structural repro dataset for reltable layout and regression checks.
